title: GCA Access Operations Runbook
scope: Public SOP for manually handling GCA access intake, read-only wallet verification, review queue statuses, support responses, and ledger handoff boundaries before public self-service account UI and ledger writes are live.

operatorWorkflow.label: Intake Triage
operatorWorkflow.operatorAction: Accept only non-sensitive account intent, public wallet address, declared GCA balance, program intent, and public transaction references.

operatorWorkflow.label: Identity Check
operatorWorkflow.operatorAction: Confirm Base Mainnet chain ID 8453 and the official GCA contract address before any review note is made.

operatorWorkflow.label: Wallet Balance Check
operatorWorkflow.operatorAction: Use read-only eth_call and ERC-20 balanceOf. Do not request signatures or transactions for balance reads.

operatorWorkflow.label: Eligibility Decision
operatorWorkflow.operatorAction: Mark 10,000 GCA holder credit eligibility and 1,000,000 GCA Member eligibility without writing live ledger records yet.

operatorWorkflow.label: Support Reply
operatorWorkflow.operatorAction: Reply with status, next step, and public links. Do not promise approval timing, listing approval, price support, audit approval, or trading results.

operatorWorkflow.label: Ledger Handoff
operatorWorkflow.operatorAction: Only after controlled account UI and ledgers are live, create credit or member records through the reviewed backend path.

operatorWorkflow.label: Platform Follow-Up
operatorWorkflow.operatorAction: When a reviewer asks for more information, send public URLs only and keep pool, contract, status, and claim boundaries consistent.

operatorWorkflow.label: Closure
operatorWorkflow.operatorAction: Close the record only after status, evidence reference, reviewer note, and next public link are recorded without secrets.

allowedEvidence: read-only GCA balance from eth_call balanceOf

decisionRules.walletLimit: one verified wallet per registered user
decisionRules.registeredUserLimit: one holder bonus and one member status review per registered user

eligibilityThresholds.walletLimit: one verified wallet per registered user
eligibilityThresholds.registeredUserLimit: one holder bonus and one member status review per registered user

responseRules.platform_follow_up: Send public URLs and consistent status only.

safeReplyTemplate: Your request has been received for manual review. GCA access claiming is not self-service yet. We can review your public Base wallet address with a read-only GCA balance check, but we will never ask for private keys, seed phrases, exchange API secrets, withdrawal permission, custody, or fund transfers.

safeClaims: GCA has published a public access operations runbook.
The operations runbook defines manual SOP before public self-service claiming is live.
Wallet review must use read-only eth_call and ERC-20 balanceOf.
Manual support cannot override on-chain wallet-balance verification or release gates.
The official public market route is the Base Mainnet Uniswap v4 GCA/USDT pool.
doNotClaim: the operations runbook is a live backend, ticket system, public submission queue, or account system
100 Web3 Radar utility credits are self-service claimable before credit ledger activation
GCA Member status is live self-service claimable before member ledger activation
support can override wallet-balance verification, release gates, or ledger activation
review status provides trading permission, live order execution, custody, withdrawals, price support, listing approval, or completed third-party audit
